sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90670" key="profe/rteros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προφέρ-τερος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προφέρ-τατος</orth>, <sense id="n90670.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προφερής</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
